title: "Manage Duplicate" Issue
excerpt: The Manage Duplicates function recently had an issue with displaying the duplicates.  Monday.com fixed this issue but now when I manage duplicates is only allows me to merge 1 set of duplicate items even when it’s displa…

posts.author: aclarkO3 (Aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: The Manage Duplicates function recently had an issue with displaying the duplicates. Monday.com fixed this issue but now when I manage duplicates is only allows me to merge 1 set of duplicate items even when it’s displaying multiple. Hoping the technical team will see this and make the fix.

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Aaron,

Mia here from monday.com I hope you’re doing well!

Would you be able to DM me your monday account name so we can open up a ticket for you? That’ll allow me to take a closer look and raise this to our Technical Support team if needed. Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I actually just submitted the same issue to support yesterday. They said it was a known issue and that they’d add my account to the list.

Thanks

posts.author: aclarkO3 (Aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: If I respond here does this DM you or the forum?
